---
description: 'Implement a feature using the SRS. Include FR/NFR/TC references, tests, and verification commands.'
---
Use the SRS as source of truth.

Output format:
1) Plan (3–7 steps)
2) SRS references (FR/NFR/TC)
3) Files to change
4) Patch summary
5) Tests (what + why)
6) How to verify (exact commands)

Constraints:
- Smallest change that satisfies the requirement
- No secrets or PII in logs
- Network calls must have timeouts + bounded retries
